ul.li: Memory Alignment: Each arp_entry is exactly 64 Bytes.
Latency Optimization: Guaranteed single-cache-line access per entry (No split loads).
Concurrency: Seqlock protects the entire structure. Readers increment seq before/after read; if mismatch, retry.
LRU Update: last_used field updated via clock_gettime(CLOCK_MONOTONIC_COARSE) on every hit.

g.text: 0x0040: Hash Table Array (256 Buckets x 8B Pointer)
ARP Entry Detail (sizeof=64B, Cache Line Aligned)

g.title: ARP Request Sent, waiting for reply
Check (hash + i) & 0xFF until match or empty
ARP Request Sent, waiting for reply
Check (hash + i) & 0xFF until match or empty
